title: SANDF brings the vibe to Oyster Festival
description: KNYSNA NEWS - As preparations for the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - As preparations for the much-anticipated 2025 Knysna Oyster Festival reach the final stages, the Knysna Municipality, through Visit Knysna, has announced an exciting partnership with the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) that will bring both musical flair and youth empowerment to this year's festivities.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - As preparations for the much-anticipated 2025 Knysna Oyster Festival reach the final stages, the Knysna Municipality, through Visit Knysna, has announced an exciting partnership with the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) that will bring both musical flair and youth empowerment to this year's festivities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The SANDF will take centre stage during the festival's formal public opening ceremony, with the army band set to deliver a rousing performance on Main Road.","html":"The SANDF will take centre stage during the festival's formal public opening ceremony, with the army band set to deliver a rousing performance on Main Road."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The band's appearance is expected to draw crowds and energise the opening day of the celebrated cultural and sporting festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beyond the music, the SANDF will be actively involved throughout the festival by hosting a career exhibition aimed at empowering young people, especially those who are unemployed or exploring new opportunities.","html":"Beyond the music, the SANDF will be actively involved throughout the festival by hosting a career exhibition aimed at empowering young people, especially those who are unemployed or exploring new opportunities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The exhibition will be held at the Knysna High School field, which is the central hub of the festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It will showcase a wide range of career pathways within the SANDF, along with information on skills development, training programmes and enlistment opportunities.","html":"It will showcase a wide range of career pathways within the SANDF, along with information on skills development, training programmes and enlistment opportunities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2025 Knysna Oyster Festival, scheduled to run over 10 days, is set to feature a diverse programme of events ranging from sporting challenges to food and wine experiences, art exhibitions and live entertainment.","html":"The 2025 Knysna Oyster Festival, scheduled to run over 10 days, is set to feature a diverse programme of events ranging from sporting challenges to food and wine experiences, art exhibitions and live entertainment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The SANDF's involvement adds a new layer of impact, combining entertainment with social development.","html":"The SANDF's involvement adds a new layer of impact, combining entertainment with social development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: SANDF brings the vibe to Oyster Festival
